textByHash.db1904753f0388bb57a4a0bceafc88c01f903645: I'm sorry, but I don't know anything.
textByHash.53263bf6600c94faa9cdd62cf367aab450dba298: Oh this is awful. Please don't tell Lord Hosidius. He'll fire me if he finds out.
textByHash.de8bc4278f648b0053748ac80e1c08acc609483d: Thank you. Before he went missing, Artur told me he was going to find the original copy of the Royal Accord of Twill. That's where he will have gone.
textByHash.557f3626d57da785671e5e657cb1aceb5f5de994: He's been spending a lot of time in the Arceuus Library recently, researching the Accord. He mentioned a librarian called Galana. Maybe she can help you.
textByHash.6aa9bb8a77437b621847011096204593b9317e46: He's been spending a lot of time in the Arceuus Library. He mentioned a librarian called Galana. Maybe she can help you.
textByHash.8a1474c8046ba5baf9994617ffe25c76f4597275: Thank you for bringing Artur home safe.
textByHash.df85eaaca09cfbf5638ad8a41f1dd6c1e7ba10a9: Sorry, I can't stop to talk.
textByHash.f37d3258bd4e138cad46a9ab3f33ca4d0ebcb549: Hello there. It's sad not having Artur around anymore, not to mention the awful business with his father. I hope he's coping okay with that.
